words.derivation: a primary preposition denoting the channel of an act;
words.kjv_def: after, always, among, at, to avoid, because of (that), briefly, by, for (cause) … fore, from, in, by occasion of, of, by reason of, for sake, that, thereby, therefore, X though, through(-out), to, wherefore, with (-in)
words.strongs_def: through (in very wide applications, local, causal, or occasional)

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: bundle, company, multitude
words.strongs_def: a fulness, i.e. a large number, throng, populace

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: branch
words.strongs_def: a twig or bough (as if broken off)

words.derivation: a primary pronoun of the first person I (only expressed when emphatic)
words.kjv_def: I, me

words.derivation: of uncertain affinity; properly, beautiful, but chiefly (figuratively) good (literally or morally), i.e. valuable or virtuous (for appearance or use, and thus distinguished from G18 (ἀγαθός), which is properly intrinsic)
words.kjv_def: X better, fair, good(-ly), honest, meet, well, worthy

words.derivation: apparently a prolonged form of an obsolete primary;
words.kjv_def: abide, + agree, appoint, X avenge, + band together, be, bear, + bewray, bring (forth), cast out, cause, commit, + content, continue, deal, + without any delay, (would) do(-ing), execute, exercise, fulfil, gain, give, have, hold, X journeying, keep, + lay wait, + lighten the ship, make, X mean, + none of these things move me, observe, ordain, perform, provide, + have purged, purpose, put, + raising up, X secure, shew, X shoot out, spend, take, tarry, + transgress the law, work, yield
words.strongs_def: to make or do (in a very wide application, more or less direct)

words.derivation: from the particle (perhaps akin to the base of G109 (ἀήρ) through the idea of a baffling wind) (backward);
words.kjv_def: her, it(-self), one, the other, (mine) own, said, (self-), the) same, ((him-, my-, thy- )self, (your-)selves, she, that, their(-s), them(-selves), there(-at, - by, -in, -into, -of, -on, -with), they, (these) things, this (man), those, together, very, which
words.strongs_def: the reflexive pronoun self, used (alone or in the comparative G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ)) of the third person , and (with the proper personal pronoun) of the other persons

words.derivation: a primary preposition denoting (fixed) position (in place, time or state), and (by implication) instrumentality (medially or constructively), i.e. a relation of rest (intermediate between G1519 (εἰς) and G1537 (ἐκ));
words.kjv_def: about, after, against, + almost, X altogether, among, X as, at, before, between, (here-)by (+ all means), for (… sake of), + give self wholly to, (here-)in(-to, -wardly), X mightily, (because) of, (up-)on, (open-)ly, X outwardly, one, X quickly, X shortly, (speedi-)ly, X that, X there(-in, -on), through(-out), (un-)to(-ward), under, when, where(-with), while, with(-in)
words.strongs_def: "in," at, (up-)on, by, etc.

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: bundle, company, multitude
words.strongs_def: a fulness, i.e. a large number, throng, populace

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: branch
words.strongs_def: a twig or bough (as if broken off)

words.derivation: apparently, a primary particle, having a copulative and sometimes also a cumulative force;
words.kjv_def: and, also, both, but, even, for, if, or, so, that, then, therefore, when, yet
words.strongs_def: and, also, even, so then, too, etc.; often used in connection (or composition) with other particles or small words

words.kjv_def: affect, covet (earnestly), (have) desire, (move with) envy, be jealous over, (be) zealous(-ly affect)
words.strongs_def: to have warmth of feeling for or against

words.derivation: from the particle (perhaps akin to the base of G109 (ἀήρ) through the idea of a baffling wind) (backward);
words.kjv_def: her, it(-self), one, the other, (mine) own, said, (self-), the) same, ((him-, my-, thy- )self, (your-)selves, she, that, their(-s), them(-selves), there(-at, - by, -in, -into, -of, -on, -with), they, (these) things, this (man), those, together, very, which
words.strongs_def: the reflexive pronoun self, used (alone or in the comparative G1438 (ἑαυτοῦ)) of the third person , and (with the proper personal pronoun) of the other persons

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.derivation: from another form of the base of G3582 (ξέστης);
words.kjv_def: staff, stocks, tree, wood
words.strongs_def: timber (as fuel or material); by implication, a stick, club or tree or other wooden article or substance

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.kjv_def: paradise
words.strongs_def: a park, i.e. (specially), an Eden (place of future happiness, "paradise")

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.derivation: from (to break up or (figuratively) enfeeble, especially the mind and body by indulgence);
words.kjv_def: delicately, riot
words.strongs_def: effeminacy, i.e. luxury or debauchery

words.kjv_def: the, this, that, one, he, she, it, etc
words.strongs_def: the (sometimes to be supplied, at others omitted, in English idiom)

words.derivation: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;
words.kjv_def: X exceeding, God, god(-ly, -ward)
words.strongs_def: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588) the supreme Divinity; figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very: — X exceeding, God, god(-ly, -ward).
